concerns.sentence: Patient presents with complete atrioventricular block [E:cond:1][E:note:row1574:2], cardiac arrest [E:cond:2], and paroxysmal ventricular tachycardia [E:cond:9] including ventricular fibrillation [E:note:row1574:9].
concerns.reason: The summary claims paroxysmal ventricular tachycardia includes ventricular fibrillation, but the fact sheet does not establish this relationship.
